channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: LA's Olympic venues were spared by wildfires, but the city's rebuild could impact the Games' runup
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — The devastation wrought by the deadly wildfires that ravaged sections of Los Angeles have left an indelible imprint on the region’s landscape and psyche.
item.dc:creator: BETH HARRIS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Unrivaled, the new 3-on-3 women's basketball league, set for debut
item.description: MIAMI (AP) — Unrivaled is ready for its closeup. The new 3-on-3 women's basketball league co-founded by WNBA stars Breanna Stewart and Napheesa Collier will debut Friday night. The idea for the domestic league was first discussed a couple of years ago and now it's come to fruition.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FEINBERG, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Security a priority at Unrivaled with cyber stalking on the rise toward women's basketball players
item.description: MIAMI (AP) — On the eve of its debut, Unrivaled held a security meeting with its players about their safety. In the past few months, three separate cyber-stalking cases have gone public with women's basketball players in college and the WNBA.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FEINBERG, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Notre Dame prepares for powerful Ohio State defense in national championship game
item.description: SOUTH BEND, Ind. (AP) — Quarterback Riley Leonard and the Notre Dame offense have faced a fierce gauntlet of defenses in their path to the College Football Playoff title game. The Fighting Irish battled their way through Penn State (No. 7 in total defense), Georgia (No. 30) and Indiana (No. 2).
item.dc:creator: CURT RALLO, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Dawn Staley's $25M extension is richest salary in women's college hoops history, South Carolina says
item.description: Coach Dawn Staley has received a contract extension that South Carolina said will make her the highest paid college women’s basketball coach of all-time at a total value of about $25 million.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Sixers center Joel Embiid to miss upcoming road trip with swelling in his left knee
item.description: Joel Embiid again has swelling in his left knee and will miss the Philadelphia 76ers’ upcoming road trip, the latest injury setback for the All-Star center who has played in only 13 games this season.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Was Oregon’s Rose Bowl performance just a one-off debacle? Former coaches assess what went wrong and what’s next
item.description: We asked three former coaches who know the Ducks well whether major changes are needed to win the CFP, or if tweaks will suffice for Dan Lanning and Co.
item.dc:creator: Jon Wilner, The Mercury News

item.title: CFP championship by the numbers: Ohio State could give Big Ten 1st back-to-back titles since 1942
item.description: The Big Ten could puff out its chest over having two of its teams in the College Football Playoff semifinals, and the conference will have another point of pride if Ohio State beats Notre Dame for the championship Monday night.
item.dc:creator: ERIC OLSON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Travel demands of 12-team College Football Playoff add momentum to ticket prices for title game
item.description: ATLANTA (AP) — Notre Dame and Ohio State fans have had to endure unprecedented travel demands throughout college football’s first 12-team playoff to reach Monday night’s national championship game.
item.dc:creator: CHARLES ODUM, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Done partying in St. Anton, new US ski standout Macuga seeks a 2nd World Cup victory in Cortina
item.description: CORTINA D'AMPEZZO, Italy (AP) — The party at St. Anton’s Krazy Kanguruh après-ski bar lasted into the early hours of Monday morning when the U.S. Ski Team’s newest standout celebrated her first World Cup victory last weekend. “I think we were home by 2.
item.dc:creator: ANDREW DAMPF, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Prep roundup: No. 1 Mitty edges No. 2 St. Francis in girls soccer
item.description: In boys basketball, Salesian continues to roll, Alameda stuns O'Dowd on half-court basket at buzzer. In girls basketball, San Ramon Valley, Priory, Salesian, Moreau Catholic among Thursday's winners.
item.dc:creator: Mike Lefkow, Correspondent, The Mercury News

item.title: Australian Open 2025: How to watch on TV, betting odds and more to know
item.description: MELBOURNE, Australia (AP) — Get caught up on the Australian Open with a guide that tells you everything you need to know about how to watch the year’s first Grand Slam tennis tournament, what the betting odds are, what the schedule is and more: How to watch the Australian Open on TV — In the
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Lindsey Vonn takes it easy in downhill training a day after crashing in Cortina
item.description: CORTINA D'AMPEZZO, Italy (AP) — Lindsey Vonn took it easier in downhill training on Friday a day after crashing for the first time of her World Cup comeback at age 40. Vonn finished more than three seconds behind leader Sofia Goggia of Italy on the Olympia delle Tofane course.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Jackson Mahomes, brother of Chiefs star, posts farewell TikTok video to followers
item.description: Jackson Mahomes, the brother of Kansas City Chiefs superstar quarterback Patrick Mahomes, put out a farewell video to his TikTok followers on Tuesday.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Utah Valley wins on overtime buzzer-beater, 85-83
item.description: ARLINGTON, Tex. (ABC4 Sports) - Texas native Kylin Green went the full length of the floor in five seconds and dished to Jackson Holcombe, who scored in the final second of overtime to lift Utah Valley to a thrilling 85-83 road victory over UT Arlington on Thursday night at College Park Center.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Boys Basketball: Rancho Buena Vista 63, La Costa Canyon 61
item.description: SAN DIEGO (KUSI- Fantastic hoops game on Wednesday night with Rancho Buena Vista edging La Costa Canyon 63-61.
item.dc:creator: Nick James, Fox 5

item.title: Gilgeous-Alexander scores 40 as Thunder roll past Cavaliers 134-114 in matchup of NBA leaders
item.description: OKLAHOMA CITY (AP) — Shai Gilgeous-Alexander had 40 points and eight assists in three quarters, and the Oklahoma City Thunder rolled past the Cleveland Cavaliers 134-114 on Thursday night in a matchup of teams with the best records in the NBA.
item.dc:creator: CLIFF BRUNT, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Utah HC's youngest player having big impact
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - Logan Cooley may only be 20 years old, but it is scary to think where the Utah Hockey Club would be without him this year. Cooley can't even drink legally, and he is second on the team in points with 12 goals and 25 assists.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Jets' Aaron Rodgers remains undecided on playing future with his focus on the California wildfires
item.description: Aaron Rodgers' playing future remains undecided, with the New York Jets quarterback focused on the lingering wildfires near his home in Southern California.
item.dc:creator: DENNIS WASZAK Jr., Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Department of Education releases memo on student-athlete NIL pay, Title IX compliance
item.description: The Department of Education's Office of Civil Rights released a fact sheet on Thursday clarifying the rules of NIL payments and Title IX compliance.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: WWE, TNA Wrestling announce multi-year partnership
item.description: WWE and TNA Wrestling on Thursday announced a multi-year partnership which will see wrestlers from both companies appear on each other's brands.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Commanders kicker Zane Gonzalez welcomes his viral moment as a chance to educate about OCD
item.description: Washington Commanders kicker Zane Gonzalez has lived with obsessive-compulsive disorder his entire life.
item.dc:creator: Stephen Whyno, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Keyonte George returns, but Jazz lose to Hornets, 117-112
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - Down three starters, the Utah Jazz young players are getting a chance to shine these days. After playing very well for three quarters, the Jazz ran out of gas in the fourth and lost to the Charlotte Hornets Wednesday night, 117-112.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Girls Basketball: Mission Hills 73, Rancho Bernardo 33
item.description: Mission Hills known to be one of the top teams to beat in the county, and they proved to be so with a dominant 73-33 win over Rancho Bernardo.
item.dc:creator: Bri Savant, Fox 5

item.title: Sammy Sosa to attend 2025 Cubs Convention, team announces
item.description: Former Chicago Cub and fan favorite Sammy Sosa will attend the 2025 Cubs Convention, the team announced Tuesday.
item.dc:creator: Ethan Illers, WGN 9

item.title: Report: Cubs not among Roki Sasaki's final 3 teams
item.description: CHICAGO — The Cubs were among the teams told they were out as the free agency frenzy for Japanese phenom pitcher Roki Sasaki has been narrowed to three clubs, according to a new report.
item.dc:creator: Andy Koval, WGN 9

item.title: Young Broncos should be proud of 10-win season
item.description: No one will ever be thrilled about losing a playoff game by 24 points, and the Broncos certainly aren't, but it's incredible how greatly Denver exceeded expectations this season.
item.dc:creator: Big Will Levenson, KREX 5

item.title: Texas man accused of sending Caitlin Clark violent messages on X: court docs
item.description: A Texas man is accused of sending sexually violent messages from his X account to Indiana Fever star Caitlin Clark and then driving to Indianapolis, court documents reveal.
item.dc:creator: Matt Christy, Fox 5

item.title: Jayden Daniels leads Commanders to first playoff win in nearly 7,000 days, 23-20 over the Buccaneers
item.description:
New owners. New general manager. New coach. New franchise quarterback.
That’s the formula — with an emphasis on the QB — that Washington rode to playoff success after nearly two decades of futility.
item.dc:creator: ROB MAADDI, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Ezra Ausar scores 21 as Utah earns first Big 12 victory
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - Ezra Ausar scored a season-high 21 points in just 17 minutes of action. as the Utah basketball team won its first Big 12 Conference game Saturday, beating Oklahoma State, 83-62.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: BYU loses third straight, falling at TCU, 71-67
item.description: FORT WORTH, Tex. (ABC4 Sports) - The BYU basketball team has hit a funk at the beginning of the Big 12 Conference season. In a back-and-forth battle in Fort Worth, the Cougars fell 71-67 to TCU for its third straight loss.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Ohio State getting shot at 6th national title after 28-14 win over Texas in CFP semi Cotton Bowl
item.description: Sawyer stripped Texas quarterback Quinn Ewers — his former roommate — and returned the fumble 83 yards for the clinching touchdown in a 28-14 victory over the Longhorns in the Cotton Bowl on Friday night, giving the Buckeyes a shot at their sixth AP national title.
item.dc:creator: STEPHEN HAWKINS, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Blue Jays add All-Star reliever Jeff Hoffman with $33 million, 3-year contract
item.description: All-Star reliever Jeff Hoffman and the Toronto Blue Jays have agreed to a $33 million, three-year contract.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Real Salt Lake trades leading scorer Chicho Arango
item.description: In the span of one year, Real Salt Lake's high-powered offense has been dismantled, leaving some fans questioning the team's direction and competitive outlook.
item.dc:creator: Mattey Casey, ABC 4
